mapper.select:
SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_TYPE AS resvType, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, R.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, H.NAME AS hospitalName, H.ADDR AS hospitalAddr FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL H ON R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND H.HOSPITAL_ID = TO_NUMBER(R.TARGET_ID) WHERE R.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL'
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'PENDING'
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'CONFIRMED'
AND R.STATUS_CD = 'DONE'
AND R.STATUS_CD IN ('CANCEL', 'REJECTED')
ORDER BY R.RESV_DATE DESC, R.RESV_TIME DESC, R.RESV_ID DESC

SELECT R.RESV_ID AS resvId, R.RESV_NO AS resvNo, R.RESV_TYPE AS resvType, R.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, R.PET_ID AS petId, R.TARGET_ID AS targetId, R.RESV_DATE AS resvDate, R.RESV_TIME AS resvTime, R.SYMPTOMS AS symptoms, R.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, R.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, R.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, R.REG_DATE AS regDate, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS petSpecies, P.BREED AS petBreed, H.NAME AS hospitalName, H.ADDR AS hospitalAddr FROM TB_RESERVATION R JOIN TB_PET P ON P.PET_ID = R.PET_ID LEFT JOIN TB_HOSPITAL H ON R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND H.HOSPITAL_ID = TO_NUMBER(R.TARGET_ID) WHERE R.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND R.RESV_ID = #{resvId} AND R.RESV_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL'
